pi_items.source: Found hardcoded as PROJECT_DIR in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.

Counted the test functions in tests/test_physics.py generated by setup_task.sh. There are exactly 5 unparameterized tests (test_integration_moves_correct_distance, test_elastic_collision_equal_mass, test_collision_heavy_vs_light, test_positional_correction_separation, test_energy_conservation).
Checked verifier.py which awards 30 points for each of the 3 bugs and 10 points for no regression (all tests passing).

privileged_info_summary: The task takes place in the project directory /home/ga/PycharmProjects/box_sim. There are actually 5 tests generated in the test suite, not 12 as claimed in the metadata. The passing threshold is 70 points out of a maximum 100 points, scored as 30 points per fixed bug (Integration, Impulse, Positional Correction) and 10 points for no regressions (all tests passing).
